mapper.select: select u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, u.region, u.status, u.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_recipes r where r.author_id = u.id and r.deleted_at is null) as recipe_count, (select count(1) from cook_posts p where p.user_id = u.id and p.deleted_at is null) as post_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions ci where ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.target_id = u.id and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active') as follower_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions ci where ci.user_id = u.id and ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active') as following_count from cook_users u where u.id = #{userId} and u.deleted_at is null limit 1

select u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, u.region, u.status, u.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_recipes r where r.author_id = u.id and r.deleted_at is null) as recipe_count, (select count(1) from cook_posts p where p.user_id = u.id and p.deleted_at is null) as post_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions ci where ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.target_id = u.id and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active') as follower_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions ci where ci.user_id = u.id and ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active') as following_count from cook_users u where u.deleted_at is null and u.status in ('normal', 'muted') order by recipe_count desc, post_count desc, follower_count desc, u.id desc limit #{limit}

select u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, u.region, u.status, u.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_recipes r where r.author_id = u.id and r.deleted_at is null) as recipe_count, (select count(1) from cook_posts p where p.user_id = u.id and p.deleted_at is null) as post_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions f where f.target_type = 'user' and f.target_id = u.id and f.action_type = 'follow' and f.status = 'active') as follower_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions f where f.user_id = u.id and f.target_type = 'user' and f.action_type = 'follow' and f.status = 'active') as following_count from cook_content_interactions ci inner join cook_users u on u.id = ci.user_id and u.deleted_at is null where ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.target_id = #{userId} and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active' order by ci.updated_at desc

select u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, u.region, u.status, u.created_at, (select count(1) from cook_recipes r where r.author_id = u.id and r.deleted_at is null) as recipe_count, (select count(1) from cook_posts p where p.user_id = u.id and p.deleted_at is null) as post_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions f where f.target_type = 'user' and f.target_id = u.id and f.action_type = 'follow' and f.status = 'active') as follower_count, (select count(1) from cook_content_interactions f where f.user_id = u.id and f.target_type = 'user' and f.action_type = 'follow' and f.status = 'active') as following_count from cook_content_interactions ci inner join cook_users u on u.id = ci.target_id and u.deleted_at is null where ci.user_id = #{userId} and ci.target_type = 'user' and ci.action_type = 'follow' and ci.status = 'active' order by ci.updated_at desc
